screens.recommendation: Replace with client-facing status only when degraded; move API/model internals to Developer details.
Keep visible. Add match day/result to button tooltip or label. Make selected scope part of interpretation summary.
Separate Ask from Choose Recipe. Hide recipe buttons when Ask Hermes is active unless used as examples.
Collapse into one stage-aware primary action: Validate interpretation, then Approve and run.
Move to Developer details or an explicit Non-match inspection drawer.
Use lowering summary: User asked, Interpreted tactically, Measured as, Does not establish.
Keep replay controls. Move IDs to Developer details. Add legend, tactical overlay explanation, and selected evidence measurements.
Default to 2-3 human measurements; move alias table to Developer details.
Show compact why matched/why not in product language; preserve full trace in Developer details.
Use tactical headline plus match/time and principal measurements. Move formal classification to Developer details.
Keep cache hit/miss in friendly language; hide raw responses by default.

required_provenance_labels.developer_copy: Host deterministic fallback or repair decided final state

accessibility_findings: Canvas has an aria label but overlay elements inside canvas are not independently accessible.
Pill color states should not be the only status signal; labels exist but warnings need stronger text.
Match selector buttons use shortened away-team names that may be ambiguous without tooltip access.
The result rail uses buttons with dense technical text; screen-reader summaries should use tactical labels.
